output.changeDescription: Removed shrink-0 from the <nav> element in both TSX and PHP. TSX: cn key changed from 'shrink-0 relative md:ml-auto' to 'relative md:ml-auto'. PHP: nav class changed from 'shrink-0 md:ml-auto' to 'md:ml-auto'. This allows the nav flex container to shrink within its md:flex-row parent, enabling the child <ul> with md:flex-wrap to wrap icons to a new line when they exceed available width instead of overflowing.

testPage.notes: No test page update needed — this is a CSS-only change with no attribute or markup structure changes. Existing 11 demo containers remain unchanged.
